title: Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures01-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 1:
Hunt the Sun Runner'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[October]] [[2002]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 1|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 1]], which was released in [[October]] [[2002]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=9780439458795 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]{{CSWECite|I|151|Cradossk}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series to a year before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by= |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls|The Cavern of Screaming Skulls]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner''''' was the first installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with the [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine Premiere Issue|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' Premiere Issue]] in [[October]] [[2002]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''When a legendary spacecraft appears, the planet Fondor and its moon, Nallastia, are on the verge of civil war to claim ownership. Only the Jedi Knights can solve the conflict and bring order back to the people of Fondor.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures01-Book.jpg|Novel cover
